specific_question: From July 2024 to September 2024, how much of the Mediconn Solutions' customer service department budget was allocated to technology and software?
answer: From July 2024 to September 2024,  18% of MediConn Solutions'  budget ($69,300) was allocated to CRM licenses, communication tools, knowledge management systems, and IT support, according to a report from MediConn's financial team.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
